reflex_coil.name: Reflex Coil
reflex_coil.summary: A twitch-fast motor coil laid in along the forearm to shave lag off ugly decisions.

ghostline_dermals.name: Ghostline Dermals
ghostline_dermals.summary: Subdermal spoof layers that teach cheap cameras to remember somebody else.

mnemonic_tap.name: Mnemonic Tap
mnemonic_tap.summary: A cranial tap that keeps packet traces and dirty codes from falling out of your head.

tendon_weave.name: Tendon Weave
tendon_weave.summary: A quiet lattice through the legs and shoulders that makes force feel cheap.

medigraft_sheath.name: Medigraft Sheath
medigraft_sheath.summary: A layered internal sheath that buys the body a little more time before it gives up.
